The below details is for BEML LOGO:  <!-- LOGO SECTION -->
  <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;text-align:center;margin-bottom:28px;">
    <div style="position:relative;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:14px;">
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:-4px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(227,30,36,0.5),rgba(14,165,233,0.5));border-radius:22px;filter:blur(16px);opacity:0.6;animation:pulse 3s ease infinite;"></div>
      <div style="position:relative;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:20px;padding:16px 24px;">
        <img id="bemlLogo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="BEML"
          style="width:140px;height:68px;object-fit:contain;display:block;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.6));"
          onerror="document.getElementById('logoFallback').style.display='flex';this.style.display='none';">
        <div id="logoFallback" style="display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:140px;height:68px;">
          <span style="font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;font-size:36px;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E31E24,#0ea5e9);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;">BEML</span>
        </div>
      </div>
